occupation: Chairman of the Board of Directors at Broadsign
headline: Chairman of the Board, President and CEO at Broadsign
summary: We invest a portfolio made up of equity and debt securities, foreign and domestic. We hold alternative investments in private equity, venture capital, real estate and hedge funds. We will  invest directly in specific opportunities.
